data.content: Plan review approved. All 6 existing touchpoints verified against codebase (MAX_TAKE_ITERATIONS, agent-pool step tracking, settings schema, outcome stats, worktree discovery, dispatch UI). Plan covers all requirements: per-queue-type counters replacing max iterations, UI setting, agent rotation with soft exclusion, retrospective shipped-success persistence, and audit screen. Child knot split (6a61/3727/447e) is clean. Key risk around retrospective success attribution is well-identified. Test strategy adequate.
